== They should add people sights of them ==

Like for example someone seen Akuma and this happened or what did he do and where [[Special:Contributions/68.107.183.170|68.107.183.170]] ([[User talk:68.107.183.170|talk]]) 22:02, 17 October 2024 (UTC)
